skills.name: lint-json
skills.description: Validate JSON and rewrite it as formatted JSON with 2-space indentation.

skills.name: repair-json
skills.description: Repair malformed JSON with JSONRepair, then return formatted valid JSON.

skills.name: minify-json
skills.description: Remove whitespace from valid JSON and return a compact JSON string.

skills.name: apply-jq-filter
skills.description: Apply a jq-style filter to JSON using the in-browser jq-lite engine.
